versions.version_description: Should be able to get really close to the original with this tab.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
CAPO 2

[Intro]

[tab]D-Gm-Bm-A[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]Gm[/ch]
 You promised the world and I fell for it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
 I put you first and you adored it[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
 Set fires to my forest[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gm[/ch]
 And you let it burn[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
 Sang off-key in my chorus[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]A[/ch]
 'Cause it wasn't yours[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Gm[/ch]
 I saw the signs and I ignored it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
 Rose-colored glasses all distorted[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
 Set fire to my purpose[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
 And I let it burn[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
 You got off on the hurtin'[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A[/ch]
 When it wasn't yours, yeah[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
 We'd always go into it blindly[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I needed to lose you to find me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
 This dance, it was killing me softly[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I needed to hate you to love me, yeah[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
 To love, love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
 To love, love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
 To love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I needed to lose you to love me, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
 To love, love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
 To love, love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
 To love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I needed to lose you to love me[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Gm[/ch]
 I gave my all and they all know it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
 Then you tore me down and now it's showing[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
 In two months, you replaced us[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gm[/ch]
 Like it was easy[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
 Made me think I deserved it[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]A[/ch]
 In the thick of healing, yeah[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
 We'd always go into it blindly[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I needed to lose you to find me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
 This dance, it was killing me softly[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I needed to hate you to love me, yeah[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
 To love, love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
 To love, love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
 To love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I needed to lose you to love me, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
 To love, love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
 To love, love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
 To love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I needed to lose you to love me[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]Gm[/ch]
 You promised the world and I fell for it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
 I put you first and you adored it[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
 Set fires to my forest[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gm[/ch]
 And you let it burn[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
 Sang off-key in my chorus[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
 To love, love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
 To love, love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
 To love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I needed to hate you to love me, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
 To love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I needed to lose you to love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
 To love, yeah[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
 And now the chapter is closed and done[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
 To love, love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
 To love, love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
 To love, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
 And now it's goodbye, it's goodbye for us[/tab]
